title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
